meaning: n.<美>食品杂货店,(pl.)食品,杂货
examples: They run a small grocery store.
I worked stocking shelves in a grocery shop.
The grocery shop is offering customers 5 cents for each shopping bag re-used.
These foods are packed with nutrients but can send your grocery bill into the stratosphere.
Next step: Get people who tried his salsa to lean on grocery stores to stock it.
